title: senna nitida
intro: Senna nitida, also known as the narrow-leaf senna or black catechu, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include laxative, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of senna nitida include relief from constipation, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Senna nitida can be consumed as a herbal tea or decoction, or it can be used as a constituent in various herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and ointments.
